Class ExLongStream

java.lang.Object
net.dapete.exceptional.stream.ExLongStream
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, BaseStream<Long, LongStream>, LongStream
public class ExLongStream extends Object implements LongStream
A LongStream with additional functionality for functional interfaces that throw Exceptions.

Implements versions of all methods from LongStream that use functional interfaces, using their counterparts with Exceptions instead, e.g. exMap(ExLongUnaryOperator) in parallel to map(LongUnaryOperator).

If these functional interfaces throw a checked exception, a ExException will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its cause.

Note that this exception will likely not be thrown when a method is called, but only when a terminal operation or a stateful intermediate operation is used on the stream (except if it is itself such an operation).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface LongStream

    LongStream.Builder, LongStream.LongMapMultiConsumer

    • exFilter

      public ExLongStream exFilter(ExLongPredicate<?> predicate)
      Equivalent of LongStream.filter(LongPredicate).

      If predicate throws a checked exception, a ExException will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its cause.

      Note that this exception will likely not be thrown when a method is called, but only when a terminal operation or a stateful intermediate operation is used on the stream.

      Parameters:
      predicate - see LongStream.filter(LongPredicate)
      Returns:
      see LongStream.filter(LongPredicate)

    • exMap

      public ExLongStream exMap(ExLongUnaryOperator<?> mapper)
      Equivalent of LongStream.map(LongUnaryOperator).

      If mapper throws a checked exception, a ExException will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its cause.

      Note that this exception will likely not be thrown when a method is called, but only when a terminal operation or a stateful intermediate operation is used on the stream.

      Parameters:
      mapper - see LongStream.map(LongUnaryOperator)
      Returns:
      see LongStream.map(LongUnaryOperator)

      public <U> ExStream<U> exMapToObj(ExLongFunction<? extends U, ?> mapper)

      If mapper throws a checked exception, a ExException will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its cause.

      Note that this exception will likely not be thrown when a method is called, but only when a terminal operation or a stateful intermediate operation is used on the stream.

      Type Parameters:
      U - the element type of the new stream
      Parameters:
      mapper - see LongStream.mapToObj(LongFunction)
      Returns:
      see LongStream.mapToObj(LongFunction)

    • exCollect

      public <R> R exCollect(ExSupplier<R,?> supplier, ExObjLongConsumer<R,?> accumulator, ExBiConsumer<R,R,?> combiner)
      Equivalent of LongStream.collect(Supplier, ObjLongConsumer, BiConsumer).

      If supplier, accumulator or combiner throw a checked exception, a ExException will be thrown instead. This will have the original exception as its cause.

      Type Parameters:
      R - the type of the mutable result container
      Parameters:
      supplier - see LongStream.collect(Supplier, ObjLongConsumer, BiConsumer)
      accumulator - see LongStream.collect(Supplier, ObjLongConsumer, BiConsumer)
      combiner - see LongStream.collect(Supplier, ObjLongConsumer, BiConsumer)
      Returns:
      see LongStream.collect(Supplier, ObjLongConsumer, BiConsumer)
